summary: Phase E.4 — Workforce Planning & Capacity Intelligence end-to-end verification. Backend: pytest regression 40/40 PASSED (test_iteration58_workforce_planning 14, test_iteration57_compliance_hub 12, test_iteration55_induction 14). Frontend: manager sees Workforce Planning tab in Staff Operations Hub, all six sections render in correct DOM order (forecast hero → manager actions → cliff edge → renewal waves → capacity → planning calendar → cliff top list), all required data-testids present, capacity panel shows 'SAFE TO RELEASE' pill, calendar toggles between 7 weekly cells and 30 monthly cells, sector swap (children↔adult) works on backend, sector=bogus returns 422. RBAC verified: staff (tier 1) cannot see the workforce-planning tab — either in normal tab bar or via ?tab=workforce-planning query param.
critical_code_review_comments: WorkforcePlanning.jsx is 559 lines — borderline acceptable but consider splitting Forecast/Cliff/Renewals/Capacity/Calendar into sub-components for maintainability.
Forecast tiles use Tailwind `uppercase` class — be aware that downstream tests using inner_text() will receive uppercased text. Not a bug, just a heads-up for future test authors.
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (tier 3), staff@care.local / Staff@123 (tier 1), admin@care.local / Admin@123 (tier 4)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing demo seed. Demo shows 1% forecast / RED RAG across horizons because seed has very few staff training cells, which is correct deterministic output.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SPA auth flow: /api/auth/login returns {token,user}; frontend stores token under localStorage 'cc_token' AND 'token'. After login the app routes to /welcome where user must click [data-testid='sector-tile-children'] or 'sector-tile-adult' BEFORE protected routes work. /staff-operations renders HubTabs; tabs are hidden via `hidden: tier < N`. Workforce Planning tab requires tier >= 3 (manager+). Backend dashboard endpoint: /api/workforce-planning/dashboard?sector=children|adult — 422 on invalid sector. Backend regression tests cover RBAC (staff 403). The Playwright DataCloneError seen during tests is from Emergent's parent-window postMessage telemetry, NOT an app bug — safe to ignore.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 40 backend tests pass, all frontend sections, testids, RBAC, and sector handling work as specified.
